endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Automation/automationAccounts/{automationAccountName}/softwareUpdateConfigurations
endpoints.description: Get all software update configurations for the account.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{AUTOMATIONACCOUNTNAME}} with a real automationaccountname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Automation/automationAccounts/{automationAccountName}/softwareUpdateConfigurations/{softwareUpdateConfigurationName}
endpoints.description: Get a single software update configuration by name.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{AUTOMATIONACCOUNTNAME}} with a real automationaccountname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{SOFTWAREUPDATECONFIGURATIONNAME}} with a real softwareupdateconfigurationname.

endpoints.name: PUT /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Automation/automationAccounts/{automationAccountName}/softwareUpdateConfigurations/{softwareUpdateConfigurationName}
endpoints.description: Create a new software update configuration with the name given in the URI.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{AUTOMATIONACCOUNTNAME}} with a real automationaccountname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{SOFTWAREUPDATECONFIGURATIONNAME}} with a real softwareupdateconfigurationname.

endpoints.name: DELETE /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Automation/automationAccounts/{automationAccountName}/softwareUpdateConfigurations/{softwareUpdateConfigurationName}
endpoints.description: delete a specific software update configuration.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{AUTOMATIONACCOUNTNAME}} with a real automationaccountname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{SOFTWAREUPDATECONFIGURATIONNAME}} with a real softwareupdateconfigurationname.
